message:
fix(validate): Remove hardcoded emoji, respect CASS_MEMORY_NO_EMOJI setting

The validate command was using a hardcoded 🔬 emoji instead of the
output.ts icon system that respects the CASS_MEMORY_NO_EMOJI env var.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
